description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty dump truck with a robust, angular cab painted in dark gray and a spacious, high-walled cargo bed in olive green. The cab features wide side mirrors, a broad windshield, and a solid front grille, designed for urban and construction environments. The cargo bed is open-topped, reinforced with vertical ribs, and equipped with a rear gate for unloading bulk materials. The truck rides on three axles with six large wheels, providing stability and load-bearing capacity. Underneath, visible fuel tanks and chassis components suggest a diesel-powered engine and a reinforced frame. The overall design emphasizes utility, durability, and the ability to transport and dump heavy loads efficiently.
description: A heavy-duty dump truck with a dark gray cab and a large olive green open cargo bed, built for hauling and dumping materials. It features six wheels, a reinforced frame, and prominent side mirrors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, large side mirrors, and the imposing grille of the truck.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the olive green dump bed, three axles, and visible fuel tank.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, rear gate, and the truck's dumping mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, dump bed, and undercarriage details.
